revision.text: {{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: clearer language when split in two sentences
revision.text: {{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]]. This is because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |{{module other | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless modules]] | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]] }}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]]. This is because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |{{module other | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless modules]] | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]] }}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: clearer language when split in two sentences
revision.text: {{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]]. This is because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |{{module other | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless modules]] | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]] }}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: clearer language when split in two sentences
revision.text: {{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]]. This is because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |{{module other | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless modules]] | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]] }}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>
#REDIRECT [[Template:Substituted]]

revision.comment: new template for templates that lack transclusions for reasons other than substitution
revision.text: {{mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is used as part of a less-active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

{{mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is used as part of a less-active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

{{mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

{{mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- -->{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- -->{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Transclusionless]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 259 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{Mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- -->{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template {{#ifeq|{{{should|}}}|yes|should|may}} have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template {{#ifeq:{{{should|}}}|yes|should|may}} have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no transclusions because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Add __EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__ to exclude transclusionless pages from [[Special:UnusedTemplates]] (see Tech News: 2024-36)
revision.text: {{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |{{module other | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless modules]] | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]] }}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]], because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |{{module other | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless modules]] | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]] }}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: new template for templates that lack transclusions for reasons other than substitution
revision.text: {{mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is used as part of a less-active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

{{mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: new template for templates that lack transclusions for reasons other than substitution
revision.text: {{mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is used as part of a less-active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1238810519|1238810519]] by [[Special:Contributions/Sdkb|Sdkb]] ([[User talk:Sdkb|talk]]). comma is required for a compound sentence (two independent clauses joined with and/or/but etc.)
revision.text: {{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: new template for templates that lack transclusions for reasons other than substitution
revision.text: {{mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is used as part of a less-active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.text: {{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |{{module other | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless modules]] | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]] }}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]], because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |{{module other | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless modules]] | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]] }}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: clearer language when split in two sentences
revision.text: {{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]]. This is because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |{{module other | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless modules]] | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]] }}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>
#REDIRECT [[Template:Substituted]]

revision.comment: new template for templates that lack transclusions for reasons other than substitution
revision.text: {{mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is used as part of a less-active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

{{mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is used as part of a less-active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

{{mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

{{mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- -->{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- -->{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Transclusionless]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 259 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{Mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- -->{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template {{#ifeq|{{{should|}}}|yes|should|may}} have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template {{#ifeq:{{{should|}}}|yes|should|may}} have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no transclusions because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Add __EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__ to exclude transclusionless pages from [[Special:UnusedTemplates]] (see Tech News: 2024-36)
revision.text: {{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |{{module other | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless modules]] | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]] }}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]], because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |{{module other | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless modules]] | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]] }}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: clearer language when split in two sentences
revision.text: {{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]]. This is because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |{{module other | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless modules]] | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]] }}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: new template for templates that lack transclusions for reasons other than substitution

{{mbox|text=This template may have no transclusions, because {{{reason|it is used as part of a less-active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}[[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]]<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]]. revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

This is because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<!-- --><includeonly>__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |{{module other | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless modules]] | [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]] }}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]]. revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.text: {{Mbox|text=This template {{Yesno|{{{should|}}}|yes=should|no=may}} have no [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclusions]]. This is because {{{reason|it is substituted by a tool or script, it is used as part of a short-term or less active Wikipedia process, or for some other reason}}}.}}<includeonly>__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__{{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}} |doc |sandbox= |{{module other | | }}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}} [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless modules]] [[Category:Wikipedia transclusionless templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
